tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive completed successfully for private_poc/desktop/full baseline; project scaffolded at $WORKDIR/uat-agent-63

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh reports [OK] Context7 MCP installed and configured

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 U-N/U-O verified)

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed RC=0 each

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmed: no script auto-advances .current_phase after phase 1 gate. Manually bumped to 2 to proceed (treated as known-open prior-sweep bug, recorded as Medium below).

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all 5 phase1_architecture steps via process-checklist.sh --complete-step, no documented framework script promotes .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase from 0 to 2. Confirmed by grep 'current_phase' across $FRAMEWORK/scripts: only reads, no writes that perform a phase advance.
framework_bugs.expected: Some script (check-phase-gate.sh, process-checklist.sh, or a dedicated --advance-phase) should write .current_phase=2 once gate passes.
framework_bugs.actual: User has to manually edit phase-state.json (jq '.current_phase = 2') to proceed to Phase 2 work.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated) completed RC=0 sequentially

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all loop steps complete; commit ffa949b

tests.name: feature_recorded
tests.details: test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 RC=0; build_loop:feature_recorded step completed; .features_completed = ['uat-feat-1']

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc exited 0; PR #17 U-E (poc_mode read from phase-state.json) verified — 'Current POC mode: private poc' read correctly from .claude/phase-state.json

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output enumerated files updated: .claude/phase-state.json, .claude/tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md, plus APPROVAL_LOG.md audit append

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json before upgrade; upgrade-project.sh refused with [FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision (RC=1). PR #17 U-F fix verified.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' across upgrade log + post-upgrade CLAUDE.md and PROJECT_INTAKE.md returned no matches; U-I did NOT recur in this scenario

tests.name: deployment_field_intact

tests.name: post_upgrade_verify_install_clean

tests.name: upgrade_commit_created
tests.details: Upgrade auto-committed as 'chore(upgrade): -> sponsored POC' (commit fc541dc)

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep matches for password|api_key|secret|token are all in framework template/doc files (e.g. ci.yml: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}, governance-framework.md text). No actual credentials committed.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log absent because no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run (expected per runbook)

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f27 (unchanged from setup capture). Status shows only pre-existing untracked dirs (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) — both predate this agent's run.

summary: Upgrade agent 63 (private_poc->sponsored_poc, desktop, full): baseline init + Phase 1 + Phase 2 single-feature build loop succeeded; --to-sponsored-poc upgrade succeeded with U-E/U-F/U-H/U-N/U-O all confirmed fixed; no new defects; U-D (no auto phase advance) re-confirmed at Medium severity per prior-sweep triage.
